---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a change to Chimera
---

## Description

What does this PR do?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test improvement

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pytest tests/ -q`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass (if applicable, `pytest tests/integration/ --run-integration -v`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check src/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project style (type hints, Pydantic v2, structlog)
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
